div.data-mendix-props:
"widgetTree":[{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.layoutGrid1","widget":"Div","props":{"class":"mx-name-layoutGrid1 mx-layoutgrid mx-layoutgrid-fluid container-fluid","content":[{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.layoutGrid1$row0","widget":"Div","props":{"class":"row","content":[{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.layoutGrid1$row0$column0","widget":"Div","props":{"class":"col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-12","content":[{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.dataView1","widget":"DataView","props":{"class":"mx-name-dataView1 form-horizontal","object":{"$type":"AssociationObjectProperty","dataSourceId":"28.14","scope":"$SearchObject","editable":true},"emptyMessage":{"$type":"TextProperty","value":""},"body":[{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.snippetCall1","widget":"Fragment","props":{"content":[{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SQL_SAMPLE.container1","widget":"Container","props":{"class":"mx-name-container1","style":{"backgroundColor":"LightYellow"},"renderMode":"div","onClick":null,"content":[{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SQL_SAMPLE.text2","widget":"Text","props":{"class":"mx-name-text2","caption":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"literal","value":"[example]
select d.name as "Name" 
, min(e.DateOfBirth) as "MinDateOfBirth" 
, max(e.DateOfBirth) as "MaxDateOfBirth" 
, sum(e.Salary) as "TotalSalary" 
, avg(e.Salary) as "AvgSalary" 
, min(e.Salary) as "MinSalary" 
from testmodule$department as d
 left join testmodule$employee_department as ed on (ed.testmodule$departmentid = d.id)
 left join testmodule$employee as e on (ed.testmodule$employeeid = e.id ) 
group by d.name
order by d.name"},"args":{}}},"renderMode":"span"}}],"ariaHidden":false}}]}},{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.actionButton3$visibility","widget":"ConditionalVisibilityWrapper","props":{"visible":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"function","name":"_hasSomeRole","parameters":[{"type":"literal","value":"Administrator"}]},"args":{}}},"contents":[{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.actionButton3","widget":"ActionButton","props":{"buttonId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.actionButton3","class":"mx-name-actionButton3","renderType":"button","buttonClass":"btn-default","caption":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"literal","value":"select sql template"},"args":{}}},"tooltip":{"$type":"TextProperty","value":""},"action":{"$type":"ActionProperty","action":{"type":"openPage","argMap":{"param$SearchObject":{"widget":"$SearchObject","source":"object"}},"config":{"name":"TinySqlStudio2/QueryTemplate_Overview_Popup.page.xml","location":"modal","resizable":true,"allowedRoles":["Administrator"]},"disabledDuringExecution":true},"abortOnServerValidation":true}}}]}},{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.textArea3$formGroup","widget":"FormGroup","props":{"class":"mx-name-textArea3 mx-textarea","style":{"margin":"10px 0px"},"control":[{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.textArea3","widget":"TextArea","props":{"inputValue":{"$type":"AttributeProperty","scope":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.dataView1","path":"","entity":"TinySqlStudio2.SearchObject","attribute":"Sql","onChange":{"type":"doNothing","argMap":{},"config":{},"disabledDuringExecution":false},"isList":false,"validation":null},"numberOfLines":10,"autoGrow":false,"placeholder":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"literal","value":"Write SQL statement"},"args":{}}},"readOnlyStyle":"text","onEnter":null,"onLeave":null,"submitWhileEditing":false,"submitDelay":300,"id":{"$type":"DerivedUniqueIdProperty","widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.textArea3"}}}],"labelFor":{"$type":"DerivedUniqueIdProperty","widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.textArea3"},"width":4,"orientation":"vertical","hasError":{"$type":"ValidationProperty","inputWidgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.textArea3"}}},{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.actionButton1$visibility","widget":"ConditionalVisibilityWrapper","props":{"visible":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"function","name":"_hasSomeRole","parameters":[{"type":"literal","value":"Administrator"}]},"args":{}}},"contents":[{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.actionButton1","widget":"ActionButton","props":{"buttonId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.actionButton1","class":"mx-name-actionButton1","renderType":"button","buttonClass":"btn-default","caption":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"literal","value":"search"},"args":{}}},"tooltip":{"$type":"TextProperty","value":""},"action":{"$type":"ActionProperty","action":{"type":"callMicroflow","argMap":{"SqlEntity":{"widget":"$SearchObject","source":"object"}},"config":{"operationId":"p09BuF9vNlCbZkjBlyzRsw","validate":"view","allowedRoles":["Administrator"]},"disabledDuringExecution":false},"abortOnServerValidation":true}}}]}},{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.actionButton2$visibility","widget":"ConditionalVisibilityWrapper","props":{"visible":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"function","name":"_hasSomeRole","parameters":[{"type":"literal","value":"Administrator"}]},"args":{}}},"contents":[{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.actionButton2","widget":"ActionButton","props":{"buttonId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.actionButton2","class":"mx-name-actionButton2","style":{"marginLeft":"5px"},"renderType":"button","buttonClass":"btn-default","caption":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"literal","value":"csv mx-textarea","style":{"margin":"10px 0px","border":"1"},"control":[{"$widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.textArea1","widget":"TextArea","props":{"inputValue":{"$type":"AttributeProperty","scope":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.dataView1","path":"","entity":"TinySqlStudio2.SearchObject","attribute":"Data","onChange":{"type":"doNothing","argMap":{},"config":{},"disabledDuringExecution":false},"isList":false,"validation":null},"numberOfLines":5,"autoGrow":false,"placeholder":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"literal","value":"Result"},"args":{}}},"readOnlyStyle":"text","onEnter":null,"onLeave":null,"submitWhileEditing":false,"submitDelay":300,"id":{"$type":"DerivedUniqueIdProperty","widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.textArea1"}}}],"labelFor":{"$type":"DerivedUniqueIdProperty","widgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.textArea1"},"width":4,"orientation":"vertical","hasError":{"$type":"ValidationProperty","inputWidgetId":"28.TinySqlStudio2.SearchDataForTxt.textArea1"}}}]}}]}}]}}]}}],"localVariableWidget":null,"localVariables":[],"selections":[]
